[IMAGE1]Question: Which Python code can generate the content of the image?
Options:
A. def printinfo( name, age = 30 ):
print "Name: ", name
print "Age ", age
return
printinfo( age=50, name="miki" )
printinfo( name="miki" )
B. def printinfo( name, age = 35 ):
print "Name: ", name
print "Age ", age
return
printinfo( age=50, name="miki" )

C. def printinfo( name, age = 35 ):
print "Name: ", name
print "Age ", age
return
printinfo( age=52, name="miki" )
printinfo( name="miki" )
D. def printinfo( name, age = 33 ):
print "Name: ", name
print "Age ", age
return
printinfo( age=52, name="miki" )
printinfo( name="miki" )
Please select the correct answer from the options above.
